final:
// // This module performs subtraction when mode is 0 and addition when mode is 1
module top_module(
    input [3:0] A,
    input [3:0] B,
    input mode,
    output reg [3:0] Q
);always @(*) begin
        if (mode == 0) begin
            Q <= A + B;
        end else begin
            Q <= A - B;
        end
    end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module performs subtraction when mode is 0 and addition when mode is 1
